name: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection
title: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection
short_description: Protect your critical network infrastructure with the Ubiquiti UACC‑ETH‑SP‑DIN, designed for bidirectional protection of Ethernet connections up to 10 Gbps. This robust surge protector supports PoE++ and shields your devices from electrostatic discharge (ESD) and electromagnetic pulse (EMP) events.
description: Protect your critical network infrastructure with the Ubiquiti UACC‑ETH‑SP‑DIN, designed for bidirectional protection of Ethernet connections up to 10 Gbps. This robust surge protector supports PoE++ and shields your devices from electrostatic discharge (ESD) and electromagnetic pulse (EMP) events. With a discharge capacity of 20 kA and a fast response to voltage surges (from 100 V/s to 1 kV/µs), it effectively absorbs transient currents to prevent damage. The compact design allows easy installation on walls or DIN rails, making it ideal for structured cabling environments. Built from durable polycarbonate and SGCC steel, it withstands indoor conditions with an operating temperature range of −40 °C to +80 °C. Whether in enterprise networks, data centers, or industrial settings, the UACC‑ETH‑SP‑DIN ensures your high-speed connections remain safe and uninterrupted.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Ethernet Surge Protection
detailed_description.text: Protect your critical network infrastructure with the Ubiquiti UACC‑ETH‑SP‑DIN, designed for bidirectional protection of Ethernet connections up to 10 Gbps. This robust surge protector supports PoE++ and shields your devices from electrostatic discharge (ESD) and electromagnetic pulse (EMP) events. With a discharge capacity of 20 kA and a fast response to voltage surges (from 100 V/s to 1 kV/µs), it effectively absorbs transient currents to prevent damage. The compact design allows easy installation on walls or DIN rails, making it ideal for structured cabling environments. Built from durable polycarbonate and SGCC steel, it withstands indoor conditions with an operating temperature range of −40 °C to +80 °C. Whether in enterprise networks, data centers, or industrial settings, the UACC‑ETH‑SP‑DIN ensures your high-speed connections remain safe and uninterrupted.

detailed_description.heading: Compact and Durable
detailed_description.text: The UACC‑ETH‑SP‑DIN features two RJ45 female connectors for seamless integration into your existing Ethernet lines. It supports data rates up to 10 Gbps and maintains minimal signal loss with a maximum capacitance of just 1.0 pF at 1 MHz. Compatible with PoE devices, it provides full protection without compromising power delivery. The DC spark-over voltage of 90 V at 100 V/s and maximum impulse spark-over voltage of 600 V at 1 kV/µs ensure reliable safeguarding of your equipment. Its compact form factor and flexible mounting options (wall or DIN rail) simplify deployment in tight spaces. Perfect for protecting routers, switches, and access points from damaging surges, this surge protector is an essential addition to any modern network demanding uninterrupted high-speed performance.
